data.body:
Review (fresh-context, cold read of plan + diff + audit): VERIFIED PASSING ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA: 1. src/index.css: All four --color-house-events-{light,deep,light-foreground,deep-foreground} declared in @theme inline immediately after Campus block. Comment block extended to credit FRAC-35 + records the editorial charcoal-on-coral JUSTIFY note (forward context for next agent). 2. src/pages/EventsPage.tsx:11: bg-house-events-light added; style={{ backgroundColor: "#D4857A" }} removed entirely; text-foreground PRESERVED per audit JUSTIFY (editorial charcoal-on-coral). Selection chrome unchanged (canonical paired-inverse). 3. src/pages/EventsPage.tsx:17: SectorHeader color="var(--color-house-events-deep)" — matches FRAC-25 mechanism precedent. 4. src/pages/EventsPage.tsx:40: Luma "Open calendar in new tab" link migrated to .text-meta with inline-block, mb-12, opacity-70, hover:opacity-100, transition-opacity, duration-300 preserved verbatim. 5. src/pages/EventsPage.tsx:12: FractalPattern color="#C13B2A" UNTOUCHED (EXCLUDED per FRAC-20/24 precedent). 6. src/pages/EventsPage.tsx:28: Luma embed wrapper bg-foreground/[0.03] border-foreground/20 UNTOUCHED (EXACT no-op). 7. src/components/sections/Events.tsx:5: text-foreground added for FRAC-42 pairing. 8. src/components/sections/Events.tsx:10:

migrated to .text-title; max-w-2xl leading-tight preserved; inner italic span left verbatim per audit. 9. src/components/sections/Events.tsx:17: text-muted-foreground added for FRAC-42 muted pairing. 10. src/components/sections/Events.tsx:9: h2 UNTOUCHED (sitewide forward observation, not migrated per-page). 11. Orphan Events.tsx NOT deleted — flagged in PR body as deletion-candidate follow-up. GREP VERIFICATION: - Raw hex search in scope files returns only the excluded FractalPattern site (EventsPage.tsx:12) and the canonical token declaration itself (index.css:70). All other raw-hex sites migrated. PRD CHECK (per CLAUDE.md mandatory): Aligns with FRAC-22 PRD — six houses, per-house tokens, mobile-first 375px baseline preserved (no layout changes; .text-meta size-up from text-xs to text-sm is within mobile-first envelope). TESTS: pnpm typecheck passes clean. pnpm test shows the 4 documented baseline failures only (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen). No regressions. SCOPE: No edits outside src/index.css, src/pages/EventsPage.tsx, src/components/sections/Events.tsx, and lattice bookkeeping. Audit doc, audit-gaps.md, DESIGN.md, audit-prompt.md all untouched. COMMITS: 4 logical commits (lattice catchup + token declarations + EventsPage migration + Events.tsx migration). Clean cadence. OUTCOME: PASS. No rework needed. Moving to done. HUMAN FLAGS (surfaced in PR body): - Editorial charcoal-on-coral preserved per audit JUSTIFY — Jules to confirm vs cream-on-saturated alignment with Campus/Lab. One-line follow-up if Jules elects to flip. - Orphan Events.tsx is not imported anywhere in the live src/ tree at HEAD; deletion-candidate flagged as separate follow-up scope.
